by some planet, immediate death may follow. (13) If the Sun
and Mars are jointly posited in the 7th from the Moon, and if
Rahu is in the Lagna. it will quit the world in ten days. (14)
Immediate end will follow if there is a malefic in the 7th house
from the rising decanate, and the weak Moon in the Lagna. 1
hope you remember the rising decanate in the given example.
It is the second of Libra. That means it is Kumbha Rali. There
are, of course, malefics in the 7th house from it viz. Leo, but
the Moon is neither weak, nor in the Lagna. So this rale cannot
be wholly applied to the present horoscope. All the same, the

SPAN OF LIFE 65
presence of so many malefics in the 7th from the rising decanate
is a defect which cannot be ignored. (15) If all the planets are
weak and posited in Apoklima houses, the child will live for two
or six months at the most. (16) If at the time of birth a Ketu is
